media.alt_text: DeWalt DPG70 Textured Rubber Coated Gripper Gloves

variants.title: DeWalt DPG70 Textured Rubber Coated Gripper Gloves

description.plain: Looking for a tough and durable glove that can handle the roughest jobs? Look no further than the DeWalt DPG70. This glove is made with a textured rubber coating that provides superior abrasion resistance, making it perfect for jobs that require a lot of hand-holding, like assembly, material handling or general construction. The palm is also textured for extra grip, so you can keep a firm hold on tools and materials, even in wet or dry conditions. And when the weather gets hot, you'll appreciate the breathable knit back that keeps your hands cool and comfortable. Plus, the DeWalt DPG70 is ergonomically designed for superior fit and feel, and the seamless fit provides maximum flexibility and high dexterity. So whether you're working in HVAC or just tackling some home improvement projects, you'll appreciate the performance of this top-quality glove. Features & Benefits: Rubber coating provides superior abrasion resistance. Textured palm for extra grip - wet or dry. Breathable knit back for a comfortable fit in hot weather. Additional Features & Benefits: Ergonomically designed for superior fit and feel. Seamless fit provides maximum flexibility and high dexterity. Suggested Uses: Assembly, Material Handling, General Construction, HVAC.

description.plain: The DEWALT DPG72T is a 13-gauge nylon shell glove that features a double-dipped Flexible Durable Grip coating to improve grip and abrasion resistance. It also features a water-resistant palm, offering an excellent grip in wet and oily conditions. Tagged for retail display.
